scope: FQ-05: Mana or Attunement system MVP — define the player magic resource before adding spells, without making non-magic ancestries feel wrong.
summary: Resource: player.attunement (current pool, world-saved next to health; pre-FQ-05 saves default to full) with max_attunement() computed live — base from player_defaults (50) + ancestry attunement_bonus + attunement_bonus summed over equipped gear — so ancestry/equipment/perk modifiers can never go stale. Recovery: constant regen everywhere (2.0/s x ancestry attunement_regen_mult), deliberately not safety-gated. Hooks: ancestry player_effects.attunement_bonus / attunement_regen_mult (read by apply_ancestry_effects, reset by apply_character; no live ancestry sets them, so non-magic characters play exactly as before); equipment effects.attunement_bonus (armor_total pattern; amulet_focus +10 is the first carrier, slot-ready but not acquirable in play); FQ-06 perks join inside max_attunement() at one documented code point. First active use: attune_pulse (R, new input action) — a harmless light pulse costing 15 with a 1s cooldown and a 4s fading PointLight2D; insufficient attunement logs and spends nothing; the light is cosmetic (no light_score/night-spawn/occlusion impact). UI: Attunement bar + current/max label directly under health via the existing bar factory, signal-wired like health_changed. Five tuning keys in player_defaults, validator-required. Extension points documented in FUTURE_PROGRESSION_RESEARCH_AND_BASE_LEVELS.md. Review should-fix applied: apply_state now only lower-bounds saved attunement (final clamp after equipment applies), preserving gear-surplus across save/load.
acceptance: Attunement displays (HUD bar + label with boot push), spends (pulse 50 -> 35), recovers (10 -> 12.17 over ~1s), and saves/loads (55 under a gear-raised max of 60 round-trips exactly — fq05_attunement_saves_and_loads)
A non-magic character still plays normally: hooks default to 0/1.0 on every live ancestry, nothing existing is gated by attunement, and the full legacy suite passes unchanged (163/163)
A future magic-user lane has documented extension points: ancestry keys, gear effect, perk join point in max_attunement(), written into the future-progression doc and VARIABLE_MATRIX
Ancestry and gear hooks proven live by smoke: attunement_bonus 20 -> max 70, amulet_focus -> max 80, removal clamps to 50, regen mult 2.0
No spellbook: exactly one harmless active use (attune_pulse), cooldown- and cost-gated
Smoke 163/163 (was 157) on windowed Godot 4.6.1; validator PASS incl. 5 new player_defaults keys + amulet_focus; capsule doctor healthy; git diff --check clean
validation: python scripts/validate_repo.py -> PASS incl. attunement player_defaults and amulet_focus checks
COHERONIA_SMOKE=1 waited windowed run -> 163/163 PASS incl. six fq05_* checks and the attune_pulse binding in input_actions_bound
decisions: Resource named Attunement per the queue's preferred direction
max_attunement() is a computed function rather than a stored var (unlike max_health) so ancestry/gear/perk modifiers can never go stale; perks join at that single point in FQ-06
Regen is constant and NOT hall-safety-gated (unlike passive health regen): magic recovers on the move; the pulse remains useful mid-expedition
Current attunement is world-owned (next to health/position), consistent with the v0.6 ownership boundary; maximum is derived at world entry
The first active use is a purely cosmetic light pulse — visible, testable, harmless; making it count toward light_score/safety is an explicit future design decision
Review should-fix applied pre-commit: load path no longer clamps against a stale pre-gear cap; the save/load smoke check now proves the gear-surplus scenario with 0.01 tolerance

Orchestration: Explore recon -> orchestrator implementation (163/163 first run) -> sonnet review (no must-fix; 1 should-fix + 1 nit fixed, 2 nits accepted) -> full re-verification green; FQ-02..04 backlog pushed to origin/main at operator request before starting
risks: Attunement economy (50 pool, 15 cost, 2/s regen) untested by human play; fully data-tunable in player_defaults
Hooks are dormant until a magic ancestry phase or an FQ-06 perk lane consumes them
fq05 pulse smoke checks depend on player physics staying disabled in that section (cooldown/fade tick in _physics_process); noted in the ledger for maintainers
next_action: FQ-06: visual player skill tree navigator (perk effects join max_attunement()).
